MINI MINUTES: JPT Vedica Puri, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (218)

APPEARANCES:
Kim Reeder appearing as a representative for the San Francisco Housing Authority.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Lisa Casey is present.
Limited Scope Attorney Carolyn Gold appearing for the defendant.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. All parties and counsel are present and confer privately with the Judge Pro Tem. Although Ms. Casey checked-in with the courtroom clerk, she did not appear for the Judge Pro Tem. As a result, she is determined as a non-appearance. Trial date remains set.
